generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
network: No internet connection. Check your network and try again.

connection: Please check your connection and try again.

extract.tiktok: We couldn't access this TikTok. It may be private or region-restricted.

extract.notFound: We couldn't find a recipe at this link. Double-check the URL.

extract.longError: Something went wrong processing this link. Try a different one or take a photo instead.
extract.connectionLost: Connection lost. Please check your network and try again.
extract.recipeNotFound: We couldn't find the recipe. Please try again.
